findings.description: RST markup directive `:doc:`./UnpublishedApi`` leaked into the knowledge file content. The source only has a toctree entry and the prose 'このツールの仕様および使用方法は下記を参照のこと。' — neither contains the `:doc:` syntax. The raw RST directive would appear as literal punctuation/text to an AI agent and is not valid Markdown or natural prose.
findings.source_evidence: Source: '.. toctree::' block with './UnpublishedApi'. Knowledge file s1 ends with: '仕様および使用方法は :doc:`./UnpublishedApi` を参照。'
